item.description:
Habitat Version v0.1 Beta 2

What's New & Improved

  • Added: License deactivation logic for pro users (hover over pro in settings).
  • Improved: Spaces and mission control movements with mice.
  • Improved: Shifted settings page up.
  • Fixed: Trackpad gestures working on desktop below menubar. [Squeak]
  • Fixed: Menubar positioning shifting on every launch.
  • Fixed: Not being able to paste with command+v for the license key.

More to come.
— Thanks for all the feedback!
